info.senderName: Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje (ARSO vreme)
info.headline: Veter - neznatna ogroženost (Stopnja 1/4) - Slovenija / osrednja

info.senderName: Slovenian Environment Agency (ARSO vreme)
info.headline: Minor Wind Warning (Degree 1/4) - Slovenia / Central

info.senderName: Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje (ARSO vreme)
info.headline: Dež - neznatna ogroženost (Stopnja 1/4) - Slovenija / osrednja

info.senderName: Slovenian Environment Agency (ARSO vreme)
info.headline: Minor Rain Warning (Degree 1/4) - Slovenia / Central

info.senderName: Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje (ARSO vreme)
info.headline: Nevihte - zmerna ogroženost (Stopnja 2/4) - Slovenija / osrednja
info.description: Možne so krajevne nevihte. Lokalno možni močnejši nalivi, piš vetra in udari strel. Hitro lahko narastejo hudourniški vodotoki. Možne so poplave meteorne vode.
info.instruction: Bodite pozorni na bližajoče se nevihtne oblake. Med nevihto se ne zadržujte na izpostavljenih mestih na primer pod drevesi ali daljnovodi. Počakajte na varnem mestu, nevihta običajno ne traja dolgo.

info.senderName: Slovenian Environment Agency (ARSO vreme)
info.headline: Moderate Thunderstorms Warning (Degree 2/4) - Slovenia / Central
info.description: Thunderstorms are possible, accompanied by local intense precipitation and gusty winds. Intense local showers with wind blasts and lightning strikes are possible. Torrential watercourses may rise quickly. Rainwater floods are possible.
info.instruction: Beware of approaching storm clouds. Do not linger in exposed locations, e.g. under trees or power lines. Wait in a safe place, as storms usually do not last long.

parameter.value: Thunderstorms are possible, accompanied by local intense precipitation and gusty winds.

info.senderName: Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje (ARSO vreme)
info.headline: Nevihte - neznatna ogroženost (Stopnja 1/4) - Slovenija / osrednja

info.instruction: Beware of approaching storm clouds. Do not linger in exposed locations, e.g. under trees or power lines. Wait in a safe place, as storms usually do not last long.
